_meta.note: 公式为原始 LaTeX 源码（KaTeX 渲染）。JSON 内反斜杠已按规范双写。tags 仅存英文 key，label 见 tags-taxonomy.json。缺真实译文的字段为 null。图片用相对路径占位。

competitions.nameZh: 第 56 届国际物理奥林匹克
competitions.descriptionZh: 2026 年国际物理奥林匹克，哥伦比亚·布卡拉曼加。理论卷 3 题、共 30 分、5 小时。
competitions.descriptionEn: International Physics Olympiad 2026, Bucaramanga, Colombia. Theory: 3 problems, 30 points, 5 hours.

problems.contentOriginal: This problem consists of three independent parts. \textbf{(a) Hydrostatic gate.} A cube of side $a$ and density $3\rho_0$, set at $45^\circ$, seals a slot of vertical size $a\sqrt2/2$ and pivots about $O$. Find $a$ so the maximum head difference is $\Delta h=1.41\,\mathrm{m}$. \textbf{(b) Electron-positron pair.} At separation $100a_0$ the velocities are antiparallel and perpendicular to the line joining them, each with angular momentum $\mu\hbar$ about the centre of mass. For $\mu=4$ find the maximum separation; for $\mu=15/2$ find the angle between the asymptotic relative velocity and the initial motion. \textbf{(c) Photodissociation of ozone.} A photon of energy $\hbar\omega$ (momentum $p=\hbar\omega/c$) is absorbed by a stationary $\mathrm{O_3}$, producing $\mathrm{O_2}$ (mass $2m$, at angle $\theta$) and $\mathrm{O}$ (mass $m$). Find the minimum $\omega$ for dissociation at angle $\theta$.
problems.contentZh: 本题含三个相互独立的小题。\textbf{(a) 静水闸门}：边长 $a$、密度 $3\rho_0$ 的正方体呈 $45^\circ$ 封住竖直尺寸 $a\sqrt2/2$ 的槽口并绕 $O$ 转动，求使最大水位差为 $\Delta h=1.41\,\mathrm{m}$ 的 $a$。\textbf{(b) 正负电子对}：相距 $100a_0$ 时二者速度反平行且垂直连线，各自对质心角动量 $\mu\hbar$。$\mu=4$ 求最大间距；$\mu=15/2$ 求渐近相对速度与初始运动方向的夹角。\textbf{(c) 臭氧光解}：能量 $\hbar\omega$、动量 $p=\hbar\omega/c$ 的光子被静止 $\mathrm{O_3}$ 吸收，生成 $\mathrm{O_2}$（质量 $2m$，夹角 $\theta$）与 $\mathrm{O}$（质量 $m$）。求在该角度解离所需最小 $\omega$。
problems.contentEn: This problem consists of three independent parts. \textbf{(a) Hydrostatic gate.} A cube of side $a$ and density $3\rho_0$, set at $45^\circ$, seals a slot of vertical size $a\sqrt2/2$ and pivots about $O$. Find $a$ so the maximum head difference is $\Delta h=1.41\,\mathrm{m}$. \textbf{(b) Electron-positron pair.} At separation $100a_0$ the velocities are antiparallel and perpendicular to the line joining them, each with angular momentum $\mu\hbar$ about the centre of mass. For $\mu=4$ find the maximum separation; for $\mu=15/2$ find the angle between the asymptotic relative velocity and the initial motion. \textbf{(c) Photodissociation of ozone.} A photon of energy $\hbar\omega$ (momentum $p=\hbar\omega/c$) is absorbed by a stationary $\mathrm{O_3}$, producing $\mathrm{O_2}$ (mass $2m$, at angle $\theta$) and $\mathrm{O}$ (mass $m$). Find the minimum $\omega$ for dissociation at angle $\theta$.
problems.answerZh: (a) 力矩平衡给出 $\Delta h_{\max}=2\sqrt2\,a$，故 $a=\dfrac{\Delta h}{2\sqrt2}\approx 0.50\,\mathrm{m}$。 (b) $\mu=4$：$\varepsilon=\tfrac{7}{25}$，$r_{\max}=\dfrac{1600}{9}a_0\approx177.8\,a_0$；$\mu=15/2$：$\varepsilon=\tfrac72$，夹角 $=\arcsin\tfrac27\approx16.6^\circ$。 (c) 记氧原子动量矢量 $\vec P=\vec p_\gamma-\vec p_2$，由能量守恒得关于 $p_2$ 的二次方程，判别式非负给出 $$\hbar\omega_{\min}=\frac{3mc^2}{3-2\cos^2\theta}\left[1-\sqrt{1-\frac{2(3-2\cos^2\theta)\,\Delta U}{3mc^2}}\right].$$ 取值分支： $$\begin{cases} \text{判别式}\ge 0 & \Rightarrow\ \text{可在该角度出射}\\ \hbar\omega=\hbar\omega_{\min} & \Rightarrow\ \text{取较小根}\end{cases}$$ $\theta=\pi/6$ 时 $\hbar\omega_{\min}-\Delta U\approx 2.03\times10^{-11}\,\mathrm{eV}$。
problems.answerEn: (a) Torque balance gives $\Delta h_{\max}=2\sqrt2\,a$, so $a=\dfrac{\Delta h}{2\sqrt2}\approx0.50\,\mathrm{m}$. (b) For $\mu=4$: $\varepsilon=\tfrac{7}{25}$, $r_{\max}=\dfrac{1600}{9}a_0\approx177.8\,a_0$; for $\mu=15/2$: $\varepsilon=\tfrac72$, angle $=\arcsin\tfrac27\approx16.6^\circ$. (c) With $\vec P=\vec p_\gamma-\vec p_2$, the discriminant condition yields $$\hbar\omega_{\min}=\frac{3mc^2}{3-2\cos^2\theta}\left[1-\sqrt{1-\frac{2(3-2\cos^2\theta)\,\Delta U}{3mc^2}}\right],$$ and at $\theta=\pi/6$, $\hbar\omega_{\min}-\Delta U\approx2.03\times10^{-11}\,\mathrm{eV}$.

problems.contentOriginal: Parallel light reflects inside a half-cylinder mirror of radius $R$ (surface $x^2+y^2=R^2,\ y\ge0$); a ray at $x=R\sin\theta$ has incidence angle $\theta$. (A) Find $x_N$, the largest $|x|$ giving at most $N$ reflections. (B) A fully absorbing container of radius $a$ sits at the paraxial focus $(0,R/2)$; find $\alpha,\beta$ in $a=\alpha\sin\theta_{\max}+\beta\sin2\theta_{\max}$, the power ratio $P/P_0$, and $a$ for $P=5P_0$ ($R=1\,\mathrm{m}$). (C) Find the reflected-ray line $y=m_Ax+b_A$, the caustic intersection $(X_c,Y_c)$, and its cusp scaling.
problems.contentZh: 平行光在半径 $R$ 的半圆柱镜（面 $x^2+y^2=R^2,\ y\ge0$）内反射；$x=R\sin\theta$ 处入射角为 $\theta$。(A) 求至多 $N$ 次反射的离轴最大距离 $x_N$。(B) 半径 $a$ 的全吸收容器在近轴焦点 $(0,R/2)$，求 $a=\alpha\sin\theta_{\max}+\beta\sin2\theta_{\max}$ 的 $\alpha,\beta$、功率比 $P/P_0$，以及 $P=5P_0$（$R=1\,\mathrm{m}$）时的 $a$。(C) 求反射线 $y=m_Ax+b_A$、焦散交点 $(X_c,Y_c)$ 及尖点标度。
problems.contentEn: Parallel light reflects inside a half-cylinder mirror of radius $R$ (surface $x^2+y^2=R^2,\ y\ge0$); a ray at $x=R\sin\theta$ has incidence angle $\theta$. (A) Find $x_N$, the largest $|x|$ giving at most $N$ reflections. (B) A fully absorbing container of radius $a$ sits at the paraxial focus $(0,R/2)$; find $\alpha,\beta$ in $a=\alpha\sin\theta_{\max}+\beta\sin2\theta_{\max}$, the power ratio $P/P_0$, and $a$ for $P=5P_0$ ($R=1\,\mathrm{m}$). (C) Find the reflected-ray line $y=m_Ax+b_A$, the caustic intersection $(X_c,Y_c)$, and its cusp scaling.
problems.answerZh: (A) $x_N=R\cos\dfrac{\pi}{2N+1}$。 (B) $\alpha=R,\ \beta=-\dfrac R2$，$\dfrac{P}{P_0}=\dfrac{1}{1-\cos\theta_{\max}}$，$P=5P_0$ 时 $a=\dfrac{3R}{25}=12\,\mathrm{cm}$。 (C) 入射方向 $(0,1)$ 对法线反射，可写成矩阵作用 $$\begin{bmatrix} d_x'\\ d_y' \end{bmatrix}=\begin{bmatrix} -\cos2\theta & -\sin2\theta\\ -\sin2\theta & \cos2\theta \end{bmatrix}\begin{bmatrix} 0\\ 1 \end{bmatrix}=\begin{bmatrix} -\sin2\theta\\ -\cos2\theta \end{bmatrix}.$$ 于是 $$\begin{aligned} m_A&=\cot2\theta, & b_A&=\frac{R}{2\cos\theta},\\ X_c&=R\sin^3\theta, & Y_c&=\tfrac{R}{2}\cos\theta\,(2-\cos2\theta).\end{aligned}$$ 小角下 $Y_c=\dfrac R2+\dfrac{3R}{4}\left(\dfrac{|X_c|}{R}\right)^{2/3}$，尖点标度 $2/3$。
problems.answerEn: (A) $x_N=R\cos\dfrac{\pi}{2N+1}$. (B) $\alpha=R,\ \beta=-\dfrac R2$, $\dfrac{P}{P_0}=\dfrac{1}{1-\cos\theta_{\max}}$, and $a=\dfrac{3R}{25}=12\,\mathrm{cm}$. (C) The reflection acts as a matrix $$\begin{bmatrix} d_x'\\ d_y' \end{bmatrix}=\begin{bmatrix} -\cos2\theta & -\sin2\theta\\ -\sin2\theta & \cos2\theta \end{bmatrix}\begin{bmatrix} 0\\ 1 \end{bmatrix},$$ giving $$\begin{aligned} m_A&=\cot2\theta, & b_A&=\frac{R}{2\cos\theta},\\ X_c&=R\sin^3\theta, & Y_c&=\tfrac{R}{2}\cos\theta\,(2-\cos2\theta),\end{aligned}$$ with cusp scaling $Y_c-\tfrac R2\propto|X_c|^{2/3}$.

problems.contentOriginal: A paramagnetic torus (volume $V$, $n$ moles, constants $K,\lambda$) obeys $TMV=nKH$, $C_M=n\lambda/T^2$, $\mathrm{d}U=C_M\,\mathrm{d}T$, with $B=\mu_0(H+M)$ and work into the system positive. (A) Find $H$, $\mathrm{d}W_{\mathrm{emf}}$, and the work on the material $\mathrm{d}W$. (B) Isothermal heat $Q$ for $H_i\to H_f$; adiabatic $\Delta T$. (C) Analyse a paramagnetic Carnot refrigerator (relate $M_1$ to $M_2,M_3,M_4$; cool $1\,\mathrm{L}$ helium; cooling time and overall COP).
problems.contentZh: 顺磁圆环（体积 $V$、$n$ 摩尔、常数 $K,\lambda$）满足 $TMV=nKH$、$C_M=n\lambda/T^2$、$\mathrm{d}U=C_M\,\mathrm{d}T$，$B=\mu_0(H+M)$，功流入为正。(A) 求 $H$、$\mathrm{d}W_{\mathrm{emf}}$ 及对材料做的功 $\mathrm{d}W$。(B) 等温 $H_i\to H_f$ 的热量 $Q$；绝热 $\Delta T$。(C) 分析顺磁卡诺制冷机（用 $M_2,M_3,M_4$ 表 $M_1$；冷却 $1\,\mathrm{L}$ 液氦；降温时间与总 COP）。
problems.contentEn: A paramagnetic torus (volume $V$, $n$ moles, constants $K,\lambda$) obeys $TMV=nKH$, $C_M=n\lambda/T^2$, $\mathrm{d}U=C_M\,\mathrm{d}T$, with $B=\mu_0(H+M)$ and work into the system positive. (A) Find $H$, $\mathrm{d}W_{\mathrm{emf}}$, and the work on the material $\mathrm{d}W$. (B) Isothermal heat $Q$ for $H_i\to H_f$; adiabatic $\Delta T$. (C) Analyse a paramagnetic Carnot refrigerator (relate $M_1$ to $M_2,M_3,M_4$; cool $1\,\mathrm{L}$ helium; cooling time and overall COP).
problems.answerZh: (A) $H=\dfrac{NAI}{V}$，$\mathrm{d}W_{\mathrm{emf}}=VH\,\mathrm{d}B$，$\mathrm{d}W=\mu_0VH\,\mathrm{d}M$。 (B) 等温 $\mathrm{d}M=\dfrac{nK}{TV}\mathrm{d}H$，故 $$Q=-\int_{H_i}^{H_f}\mu_0 VH\,\mathrm{d}M=-\frac{\mu_0 nK}{T}\int_{H_i}^{H_f} H\,\mathrm{d}H=\frac{\mu_0 nK\,(H_i^2-H_f^2)}{2T}.$$ 绝热不变量 $\dfrac{\lambda+\mu_0KH^2}{T^2}=\text{const}$，得 $$\begin{aligned} \Delta T&=T_i\!\left[\sqrt{\frac{\lambda+\mu_0KH_f^2}{\lambda+\mu_0KH_i^2}}-1\right].\end{aligned}$$ (C) $M_1=\sqrt{M_2^2-M_3^2+M_4^2}$；一个循环后液氦 $1.00\,\mathrm{K}\to0.990\,\mathrm{K}$；$t=\dfrac{C_c}{P}\!\left[T_h\ln\dfrac{T_0}{T}-(T_0-T)\right]$，$\mathrm{COP}=\dfrac{T_0-T}{T_h\ln(T_0/T)-(T_0-T)}$。
problems.answerEn: (A) $H=\dfrac{NAI}{V}$, $\mathrm{d}W_{\mathrm{emf}}=VH\,\mathrm{d}B$, $\mathrm{d}W=\mu_0VH\,\mathrm{d}M$. (B) Isothermally, $$Q=-\frac{\mu_0 nK}{T}\int_{H_i}^{H_f} H\,\mathrm{d}H=\frac{\mu_0 nK\,(H_i^2-H_f^2)}{2T},$$ and from the adiabatic invariant $(\lambda+\mu_0KH^2)/T^2=\text{const}$, $$\begin{aligned}\Delta T&=T_i\!\left[\sqrt{\frac{\lambda+\mu_0KH_f^2}{\lambda+\mu_0KH_i^2}}-1\right].\end{aligned}$$ (C) $M_1=\sqrt{M_2^2-M_3^2+M_4^2}$; helium $1.00\,\mathrm{K}\to0.990\,\mathrm{K}$; $t=\dfrac{C_c}{P}\!\left[T_h\ln\dfrac{T_0}{T}-(T_0-T)\right]$, $\mathrm{COP}=\dfrac{T_0-T}{T_h\ln(T_0/T)-(T_0-T)}$.
